channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court transfers Twisha Sharma death probe to CBI, urges media restraint amid ongoing investigation
item.description: The Supreme Court of India took suo motu cognisance of the death of former model and actor Twisha Sharma, who was found dead at her matrimonial home in Bhopal on May 12. During the hearing, a bench le...

item.title: Japan begins geological review of Minamitorishima as potential site for nuclear waste disposal
item.description: Japan’s National Waste Management Organization (NUMO) has initiated the first stage of an assessment to determine whether Minamitorishima, a remote island in the Ogasawara chain, could serve as a long...

item.title: Obituary: Pierrette Lucas, Canadian diplomat and public servant remembered for her independent spirit
item.description: Pierrette Lucas, born Pierrette Alain in Montreal on November 28, 1940, and died on March 5, 2026 in Victoria at age 85, is remembered as a charismatic, unconventional, and influential Canadian public...

item.title: Sizwe Dhlomo responds to reports of Unathi Nkayi’s alleged drunk driving arrest
item.description: Radio personality Sizwe Dhlomo has publicly reacted to reports that former broadcaster Unathi Nkayi was allegedly arrested for drunk driving. His reaction came after he reshared a Sunday Times post on...

item.title: Melrose Arch records low vacancy rates and rising tenant demand in Johannesburg
item.description: Melrose Arch continues to strengthen its position as one of Johannesburg’s leading mixed-use commercial precincts, supported by strong tenant demand, low vacancy levels and ongoing retail and hospital...

item.title: How political mythmaking shapes perceptions of the drug war and accountability in the Philippines
item.description: The opinion piece examines how political mythmaking is used by Filipino leaders to shape public perception, focusing on Senator Alan Peter Cayetano’s rhetoric and its implications. It explains that po...

item.title: Three Canadian flotilla activists return to Vancouver after detention in Israel
item.description: Three Canadian activists who had been detained in Israel after participating in a flotilla have returned safely to Vancouver, according to reporting by The Canadian Press. The individuals arrived in t...

item.title: John Laws bequeaths $5.5 million art collection to the Art Gallery of NSW
item.description: The late Australian radio broadcaster John Laws has made a significant cultural contribution through the quiet donation of 10 artworks valued at approximately $5.5 million to the Art Gallery of New So...

item.title: US and Iran continue slow negotiations over Strait of Hormuz and nuclear program
item.description: US President Donald Trump has stated that his administration will not rush negotiations with Iran over a possible peace agreement aimed at ending the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Although Trum...

item.title: PSX rallies strongly as easing Middle East tensions boost investor confidence
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) began the shortened trading week with strong bullish momentum on Monday, as the benchmark KSE-100 Index recorded major gains during intraday trading. The market opene...

item.title: Nigerian Players Across Europe End 2025/26 Season With Strong Performances And Trophy Success
item.description: Several Nigerian footballers wrapped up the 2025/26 European football season with strong performances, important goals and major achievements for their clubs across different leagues. In Italy, Super ...

item.title: Study Links Severe Hospital-Treated Infections to Increased Dementia Risk in Older Adults
item.description: A large population-based study suggests that severe bacterial infections requiring hospital treatment may significantly increase the risk of developing dementia later in life. The research, published ...

item.title: British volunteer Ayrton Redfearn killed while serving in Ukraine’s Donetsk region
item.description: Ayrton Redfearn, a 23-year-old British national from Devon, has been confirmed killed in action in Ukraine’s Donetsk region on 9 May. He had travelled to Ukraine in 2025 to join a specialist unit supp...

item.title: Tanzania Gulf Crisis Report Flags High Risks to Energy, Food, Transport, Tourism and Government Budget
item.description: A May 2026 rapid assessment by Tanzania’s National Planning Commission (NPC), in collaboration with UNDP, has concluded that the ongoing Gulf crisis is creating significant economic pressure across ke...

item.title: Supreme Court hears case on Twisha Sharma death amid dowry allegations and probe irregularities
item.description: The Supreme Court of India is scheduled to hear a suo motu case concerning the death of 32-year-old actor-model Twisha Sharma, which occurred at her matrimonial home in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The cas...

item.title: NCAA pauses enforcement of ‘No Pay, No Service’ policy amid talks over N12bn airline debts
item.description: The Nigeria Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) has suspended the enforcement of its planned ‘No Pay, No Service’ directive that was earlier targeted at 11 operating airlines over unpaid statutory charges...

item.title: South Africa increases regional cooperation with neighbouring states to address undocumented migration and border management
item.description: The South African government is intensifying cooperation with neighbouring countries in response to rising concerns over undocumented migration and border security. According to a written parliamentar...

item.title: PM Shehbaz and Chinese Premier Li Qiang discuss Middle East peace and strengthening Pakistan-China cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday held an important meeting with Chinese Premier Li Qiang at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, where both leaders discussed bilateral relations and the evo...

item.title: First responders rescue infant from vehicle swept into floodwaters in Beeville, Texas
item.description: First responders in Beeville, Texas, carried out a dramatic rescue after a vehicle became trapped and partially swept away by rapidly rising floodwaters during severe storms. The incident occurred at ...

item.title: Kim Chiu reacts humorously to her breakup scene during It’s Showtime segment
item.description: An ABS-CBN Entertainment report published on May 25, 2026 highlights a lighthearted moment from the noontime variety show It’s Showtime, where actress and host Kim Chiu was seen reacting with uncontro...
